issues.message: Try It exercise "try-rename-and-remove-tracked-files-sketch2" reproduces the worked example in "Verify Staged Renames and Deletions" (sketch2) through solutionCode. Change a meaningful expectation such as the requested output, source entity, filter, aggregate, input, inserted/updated values, or relationship path. Formatting, capitalization, aliases, and ORDER BY alone do not make it a different exercise.
